subcodes.first_line: O Mahmud! The Adored One hath turned toward thee from this praiseworthy station and maketh mention of thee with that which diffuseth the fragrance of His loving-kindness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمود قد توجه الیک المعبود من هذا المقام المحمود و یذکرک بما یتضوع به عرف عنایه
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @prophecy and fulfillment, @praise and encouragement
